title: TranslationModel
description: Information about a translation model in IBM Watson Language Translator V3.

model_id.description: A globally unique string that identifies the underlying model used for translation.

name.description: Optional name specified when the model was created.

base_model_id.description: Model ID of the base model used to customize this model. Empty string if not a custom model.

domain.description: The domain of the translation model.

customizable.description: Whether this model can be used as a base for customization.

default_model.description: Whether this model is a default model for a given language pair.

owner.description: The IBM Cloud ID of the instance that created the model. Empty string for IBM-provided models.
